productDisplayName: Reebok Women Easytone Reenew White Red Shoe
description: RUNS THAT HELP YOU SHAPE UPFor those who are looking for shoes that help increase muscle activation, look no further. Here comes from the house of reebok the EasyTone range of shoes. An absolute rage with their balance pods, the reebok EasyTone range of shoes work on the premise that when an unstable surface is created your leg muscles act in a different way, toning them in a different way. The EasyTones make being on your feet all the more comfortable and help tone the leg and butt muscles better.Shapely instabilityThe balance pods under EasyTone shoes are placed strategically to create a slight instability that forces the leg muscles to work harder and encourage more toning. In fact, Reebok&rsquo s research has found that the muscles of the gluteus tone by 28% and at the hamstrings and calves by 11% with the regular use of EasyTone shoes. While the EasyTone shoes are primarily walking shoes, there is also a running version and casual flip flops as well employed with balance pods.The Reebok EasyTone balance ball pods are engineered with Moving Air Technology that transfers air in response to the way you walk. This sole technology helps tone up the muscles with every move. The Reebok EasyTone came as a great competition to MBT, offering health benefits with a walking shoe at a much lower price compared to this competitor. The sole of the Reebok EasyTone has the two balancing cushion bumpers at the toe and heel, which result in quicker heel strike and toe strike. With such technology employed in the outsole of the shoe, you will realise that you walk with shorter and quicker steps in the Reebok EasyTone, rather than the regular longer stretching step.Trapping air for comfortThe two hollow cushioning pods are created with DMX Max technology that provides maximum cushioning to the walker. The air trapped in the two DMX Max hollows travel back and forth under the foot in tune with the walker&rsquo s individual stride, delivering sensational cushioning and comfort.Designed in type and style as athletic footwear, the Reebok EasyTone shoes are made for exercise. Coming in a wide variety of colours and styles, the Reebok EasyTone is trendy and attractive to look at, coupled with its lightweight and flexibility. Competitively priced, these shoes force more effort in walking than any other standard shoe, such that results have shown a 28% more muscle tone in the calves when walking in EasyTone shoes.Made of rich leather and suede uppers, the Reebok EasyTone range is designed to last for years. The shoe is stitched in a smooth seamless design and ensures minimal abrasion between the foot and shoe, decreasing irritation and avoids formation of blisters. With a removable anti-bacterial sockliner in place, the Reebok EasyTone is probably the best of walking shoes one could ever own, especially if the individual wants to stay toned and shaped.Upper Synthetic and fabric uppers with synthetic overlays for lightweight breathability Padded collar and tongue for superior Fit and comfort Removable, antibacterial sockliner easily accommodates orthotics Lace-ups for a snug fit Logo name on tongue and behind collar Logo design on the sides in the form of strategic panelling Midsole EVA midsole for cushioning and better shock absorption Outsole EasyTone's pockets of moving air technology promote micro-instability thereby helping to improve muscle tone in the glutes, calves and hamstrings Non-marking rubber outsole Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
